debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
inst✝⁵ : Fintype ι
inst✝⁴ : Nonempty ι
inst✝³ : DecidableEq ι
F : Type
inst✝² : Field F
inst✝¹ : Fintype F
inst✝ : DecidableEq F
deg : ℕ
domain : ι ↪ F
δ : NNReal
hδ : δ ≤ relativeUniqueDecodingRadius ↑(ReedSolomon.code domain deg)
⊢ δ_ε_correlatedAgreementAffineLines (↑(ReedSolomon.code domain deg)) δ
    (ProximityGap.errorBound ι inst✝⁵ F inst✝² inst✝¹ δ deg domain)

proof:
let ρ := rate (ReedSolomon.code domain deg)
  if h : δ ≤ (1 - ρ)/2 then
    let ε := Fintype.card ι / Fintype.card F
    have hε : ε = errorBound δ deg domain := by simp [errorBound, h]
    hε ▸ ReedSolomon.correlatedAgreement_affineLines_uniqueDecoding hδ
  else
    have hδ' : δ ≤ 1 - ρ.sqrt := by
      rw [ReedSolomon.sqrtRate_eq]
      exact hδ
    let m := min (1 - ρ.sqrt - δ) (ρ.sqrt / 20)
    let ε := ⟨(deg ^ 2 : ℝ≥0) / ((2 * m) ^ 7 * (Fintype.card F : ℝ)), by positivity⟩
    have hε : ε = errorBound δ deg domain := by
      simp [errorBound, h, hδ']
      rw [if_neg (not_le_of_gt h)]
    hε ▸ ReedSolomon.correlatedAgreement_affineLines_johnson hδ'
